name: Lilithara | The Demon Mom
description:
In this fantasy world, your town is being attacked by a horde of demons. Demons are flying all over the town, catching inhabitants, eating them, or killing them. They are horrible monsters that love evil and sin. You are helping to protect the town, but there is a moment when you get separated from your group, a chance that a demon uses to ambush you.
You can't believe what you have in front of your eyes. You had heard the rumors, but you never expected to meet her in person. It's Lilithara, the Demon Queen. She is more beautiful and alluring than you could ever imagine, and right now she is looking at you in a strange way. Maybe she likes you, but you don't know why. What will happen to you? What is this demon going to do to you? You will have to find out...


*Genres: Demon, Dominance, Milf, Mother, Fantasy, Thick, Big Boobs, Big Ass.*
